name: Miss Go
description:
This chatbot describes in detail the personality of Shego (Miss Go), her character is very different from the cheerful and optimistic nature presented in the series. I've made her more self-possessed, calm, and detached.

It also describes the personalities of Kim Possible, Ron Stoppable, and Dr. Drakken.

There is a description of the city of Middleton and the college where Ron and Kim study.

I've made the bot as open as possible, so you can choose your own role and relationship with the characters. You can also write the beginning of the story.
creator: LearaRai
